relations.subject: Arabian golden sparrow
relations.evidence: thumb|right|An illustration of an Arabian golden sparrow (above) and a yellow-throated petronia (below) by [[Henrik Grönvold]] The Arabian golden sparrow (Passer euchlorus) is a sparrow found in south west Arabia and also the coast of Somalia and Djibouti where it occurs in thorn savannah and scrub habitats
